title: Honest cost label — 'Session Cost' was actually 24h total
current_state: on_exit() printed [Session Cost: $X.XXXX] but the value came from evolution.get_recent_interactions(hours=24), summing ALL interactions in the last 24h — not just the current session. User in a 2-turn normie (free) session saw $0.25 from earlier autonomous sprint runs and reasonably asked why their normie chat cost money.
target_state: Label changed to [24h Cost: $X.XXXX] so the number matches the window being summed.
